description: Match pairs of tropical leaves before the timer runs out.

headerBest.name: Best score label
headerBest.description: Header label preceding the session-best score.

headerLevel.name: Level label
headerLevel.description: Header label preceding the current level indicator.

headerTime.name: Time label
headerTime.description: Header label preceding the remaining seconds.

bestEmpty.name: Best score placeholder
bestEmpty.description: Shown in place of the score when the player has not passed any round yet.

levelDisplay.name: Level value template
levelDisplay.description: Current level vs. total levels. Keep both placeholders.

timeDisplay.name: Time value template
timeDisplay.description: Remaining time with a units suffix (e.g. seconds).

announceRoundStarted.name: Announcer: round started
announceRoundStarted.description: Live-region screen-reader message when the round begins (after peek phase ends).

announceMemorize.name: Announcer: memorize
announceMemorize.description: Live-region screen-reader message during the peek phase while cards are revealed.

announceOutOfTime.name: Announcer: out of time
announceOutOfTime.description: Live-region screen-reader message when the round timer hits zero.

announceRoundPassed.name: Announcer: round passed
announceRoundPassed.description: Live-region screen-reader message when all pairs are matched.

announceMatch.name: Announcer: match
announceMatch.description: Live-region screen-reader message when the player flips a matching pair.

announceNoMatch.name: Announcer: no match
announceNoMatch.description: Live-region screen-reader message when the player flips a mismatched pair.

ariaCard.name: Card aria-label
ariaCard.description: Screen-reader label for each tile. Index is 1-based.

ariaBoard.name: Board aria-label
ariaBoard.description: Screen-reader label for the grid of cards.

startTitle.name: Start screen title
startTitle.description: Headline shown on the start screen before the player begins level 1.

startBody.name: Start screen body
startBody.description: Instructions shown on the start screen.

startButton.name: Start button
startButton.description: Label for the button that begins level 1.

winTitleLevel1.name: Win title (level 1)
winTitleLevel1.description: Headline shown after the player passes level 1.

winTitleLevel2.name: Win title (level 2)
winTitleLevel2.description: Headline shown after the player passes level 2.

winTitleLevel3.name: Win title (level 3)
winTitleLevel3.description: Headline shown after the player passes level 3.

winTitleLevel4.name: Win title (final level)
winTitleLevel4.description: Headline shown after the player passes the final level. Tone is intentionally celebratory and bot-aware.

winBodyNewBest.name: Win body (new best)
winBodyNewBest.description: Body shown when the round score beats the previous session best.

winBodyScore.name: Win body (regular)
winBodyScore.description: Body shown after a passed round when the score did not beat the previous best.

winRetry.name: Retry button (win screen)
winRetry.description: Label for the button that restarts the same level after passing it.

winLevelUpDefault.name: Level-up button (default)
winLevelUpDefault.description: Fallback label for the advance-level button when no per-level label is defined.

winLevelUpAfter1.name: Level-up button (after level 1)
winLevelUpAfter1.description: Label for the button that advances from level 1 to level 2.

winLevelUpAfter2.name: Level-up button (after level 2)
winLevelUpAfter2.description: Label for the button that advances from level 2 to level 3.

winLevelUpAfter3.name: Level-up button (after level 3)
winLevelUpAfter3.description: Label for the button that advances from level 3 to level 4 (the final level).

lossTitle.name: Loss screen title
lossTitle.description: Headline shown on the loss screen when the timer expires.

lossBody.name: Loss screen body
lossBody.description: Body text shown on the loss screen.

lossRetry.name: Retry button (loss screen)
lossRetry.description: Label for the button that restarts the failed level.

lossEasier.name: Try easier button
lossEasier.description: Label for the button that drops one level down. Hidden at level 1.

en.startBody: Flip two cards at a time to find matching leaves. Clear the board before time runs out.
en.winTitleLevel4: No bot can ever be that good!
en.lossBody: The board did not clear before the buzzer.

ar.startBody: اقلب بطاقتين في كل مرة للعثور على أوراق متطابقة. أكمل اللوحة قبل انتهاء الوقت.
ar.winTitleLevel4: لا يمكن لأي روبوت أن يكون بهذه البراعة!
ar.lossBody: لم تكتمل اللوحة قبل انتهاء المؤقت.
